purpose: Explains the dashboard's view modes (Wave, Chain, IDE, Git) and the visual layout systems behind them. Covers WavePipeline grid rendering, ChainPipeline BFS dependency-line drawing with SVG, the pathway grid overlay, and how SET_VIEW transitions reconfigure the main render tree.
gotchas: ChainPipeline uses BFS to compute dependency line endpoints — large graphs can be expensive
SVG overlay must re-measure on resize; depends on ResizeObserver via useResize
Wave layout assumes wave numbers are 1-indexed contiguous integers
patterns: Visual mode driven by single SET_VIEW reducer action
Overlay SVG drawn over CSS grid for dependency lines
conventions: Layout CSS lives in src/ui/styles/ next to component CSS
